holdings.infoBox: IMCB is an equity ETF with a total of 407 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 1.93%, Marvell Technology at 1.77%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 1.50%, Western Digital at 1.45%, and Corning at 0.93%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar Mid-Cap ETF (IMCB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar US Mid Cap Market index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index consisting of US mid-cap stocks with both growth and value characteristics. IMCB was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
